title: Clipboard Universal
shortDescription: Clipboard Universal is a Windows clipboard manager that saves text, images, audio, video, PDFs, and files in one organized place, always ready to paste and unobtrusive.
description: Clipboard Universal is a modern clipboard history manager for Windows that captures everything you copy and keeps it organized. It understands text, images, audio, video, PDF documents, and other files, storing them in one clear place so they are ready to reuse whenever you are. Running quietly in the system tray, Clipboard Universal brings order to everyday copy and paste without getting in the way.
features: Complete history for text, images, audio, video, PDFs, and files
Fast search by text, tags, and file name
Live previews for text and images
runs in the system tray with auto refresh
Paste all items at once for faster workflow
Complete clipboard history: Save text, images, audio, video, PDFs, and files.
Modern interface: Beautiful design with light and dark themes.
Quick search: Find any item by text, tags, or file name.
Advanced file support: Works with Explorer, showing file type and details.
Pin and unpin: Keep important items always at hand.
Easy management: Clear all or only non-pinned items with one click.
Live preview: Instantly view text and image content without opening apps.
Optimized performance: Lightweight storage with no impact on system speed.
benefits: Turn routine file and data tasks into guided workflows
Keep everyday work organized on the desktop
Built around complete history for text, images, audio, video, PDFs, and files
Built around fast search by text, tags, and file name
Built around pin favorites, clear non pinned
